seed_phrase: Everybody is counting on me and I know in my heart of hearts I can't do it.
I hate myself. All I hear all day long is my brain saying I hate myself.
I can enjoy the most beautiful perfect day sometimes and it just makes the crash feel harder and more inevitable.
I wish I could just disappear. Everybody would be happier.
I look at boys and I look at girls and don't understand some of the feelings I have.
I can't decide if I'm happy with where I've ended up. I want to be.
Maybe I have enough? Maybe always wanting more and more is just hurting me?
I spent my life _building_ a life and sometimes I just want to blow it all up out of boredom.
I drink for fun, I still have fun when I drink. Worse than the occasional hangover wold be lying to myself.
I always thought my grow-up life would be boundless, not so small.
